title: Poovakkelu lyrics Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Karthik, Shreya Ghoshal
Song: Poovakkelu
Movie : Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai
Lyrics : Yugabharathi

Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu
Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu enna pathi sollum
Maana kelu mayila kelu mazhai katta sollum
Therathathe aasai,verenna nan pesa
Ennodu nee, pathi illaye,
nee illayen, nanum bommaye,
enthan uyirum neye neeye

Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu enna pathi sollum
Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu
Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu enna pathi sollum

Moonu Muthu velli muthu, nan mudinchu vachen mundhanethu
Thali katta nenthu kittu, nan thavichirunthen vazhiya paathu
Nee pogum vazhiyil, Nilal nanaagi vizhavaa...
Thoongatha vizhiyil, thunai sernthaaye medhuvaaa
Onnum puriyama, thaazham thatturene
Solla therriyaama vaaya katturene
Aaga motham kadhal idhu sarithaane

Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu enna pathi sollum
Maana kelu mayila kelu mazhai katta sollum
Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu
Poovakkelu, Kathakkelu enna pathi sollum

Aeridichu kadhal pithu, sevanthupochu malli mottu
Aasa romba muthipochu, aadi parpom jallikattu
Vendaatha thanimai,ithai yaarodu unnara
theendatha koduma,sudum theeyaagi padara
Sadhi enna sadhi thevayilla maane
kadhaluku theva anbu mattum thaane
Aaga motham kadhal idhu sarithaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poovakkelu?

The song Poovakkelu expresses themes of love and longing, conveying deep emotional connections between the characters.

What is the plot context of the movie Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai?

The movie Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai revolves around love and relationships, showcasing the journey of its characters through various emotional landscapes.

Who are the singers of Poovakkelu?

The song is sung by the talented duo Karthik and Shreya Ghoshal, known for their melodious voices.

Who composed the music for Poovakkelu?

The music for Poovakkelu was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, renowned for his timeless melodies.

When was Poovakkelu released?

Poovakkelu was released on March 19, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poovakkelu, the characters express their deep affection and yearning for each other, encapsulating the essence of romantic love. The soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, complements the heartfelt lyrics penned by Yugabharathi. This song serves as a pivotal moment in Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai, highlighting the emotional bond between the protagonists. The harmonious blend of Karthik and Shreya Ghoshal's voices evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a timeless romantic classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poovakkelu from Azhagarsamiyin Kudhirai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Karthik and Shreya Ghoshal, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and Ilaiyaraaja's magical composition. Experience the soothing vibes of this romantic melody that will transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me. The desires of the road, what else can I say? You are not with me, I am also a doll, my life is you, you are me.
Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me.

Three pearls, silver pearls, I have finished my task. I was waiting for the wedding, I was looking at the path you take. In your path, the moonlight shines... In the sleepless eyes, you have become my companion. Without understanding anything, I am falling down. Without saying anything, I am closing my mouth. This is all love, isn't it?
Flowers speak, they tell about me. The desires of the road, what else can I say? Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me.

Love has become crazy, the flower has bloomed. The desire has grown a lot, we will see the jallikattu (bull-taming event). The loneliness that cannot be shared, who can bear this pain? It burns like fire. There is no need for anything else for love, only affection is enough. This is all love, isn't it?
Flowers speak, they tell about me. The desires of the road, what else can I say?
The desires of the road, what else can I say? You are not with me, I am also a doll, my life is you, you are me.
Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me. Flowers speak, they tell about me.
